title: Other Cannibals
overview: This utterly surprising debut gets cinematically richer with every twist and turn – allowing for moments of fabulously deranged buddy comedy, touching a sense of Western, always staying true to being a descent into the abyss of the human mind and desire.

trailers.title: OTHER CANNIBALS Trailer | PÖFF 2021
trailers.channel_name: PÖFF | Tallinn Black Nights Film Festival
